description: Live zero-shot river-discharge forecast subset: ~240 USGS gauges spanning popular USA whitewater + paddler-favored runs across the West, Mountain West, Appalachia, NE, Cascades, Sierra, Texas Hill Country, and Great Lakes / Driftless
selection_criteria: Curated free-flowing + popular USGS gauges; verified IDs/names against USGS NWIS site service. Mix of pure-whitewater, regional flagship rivers, and snowmelt-anchor sites for forecast diversity.
